description_for_human: Translate natural language to shell commands and execute them in a secure sandbox. Privacy-first, runs locally.
description_for_model: NL2Shell translates natural language to bash/shell commands using a fine-tuned 800M model and can execute them in isolated Docker containers with no network access. Use POST /api/translate with {"query": "description"} to get a command, then POST /api/execute with {"sessionId": "id", "command": "cmd"} to run it safely. Create sessions with POST /api/session first. MCP endpoint at POST /api/mcp.
